title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 10 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 10 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 10 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.74 % today, the main contract closed at 819.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 909-910 yuan/mt.
